configurableSettings.name: num_epochs
configurableSettings.label: Number of Epochs
configurableSettings.description: Number of epochs for training the model.

configurableSettings.name: train_patch_size
configurableSettings.label: Patch Size for training
configurableSettings.description: Patch size for training the model.

configurableSettings.name: test_patch_size
configurableSettings.label: Patch Size for predict
configurableSettings.description: Patch size for inference from the model.

configurableSettings.name: train_batch_size
configurableSettings.label: Batch Size for training
configurableSettings.description: Batch size for training the model.

configurableSettings.name: test_slice_batch_size
configurableSettings.label: Batch Size for Slicing
configurableSettings.description: For big images, we slice the images, and this parameter determines how many slices are sent to the model at once

configurableSettings.name: checkpoint
configurableSettings.label: Weights Path
configurableSettings.description: Path where the weights are located on the backend machine.

configurableSettings.name: num_queries
configurableSettings.label: Num of Queries
configurableSettings.description: num_queries for the Grounding DINO model.

configurableSettings.name: max_per_img
configurableSettings.label: Max objects per image
configurableSettings.description: Total max objects per image. Ideally set it same as num_quries.

configurableSettings.name: train_num_workers
configurableSettings.label: Num of workers per gpu
configurableSettings.description: The pytorch workers are responsible for loading images for CPU

configurableSettings.name: train_persistent_workers
configurableSettings.label: Persistant Workers
configurableSettings.description: Whether to pin the threads to the particular process
